description: Nutrient-powered PDF extraction. Replaces the default pdfjs text extractor with Nutrient's pdf-to-markdown CLI for dramatically better table, heading, and reading-order preservation.

command.description: Path to the pdf-to-markdown CLI binary. Defaults to 'pdf-to-markdown' on PATH.

timeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for the Nutrient CLI per document. Default: 30000.

autoEnable.description: Automatically set the PDF extraction engine to 'auto' (Nutrient with pdfjs fallback) when the plugin loads. Default: true.

command.label: Nutrient CLI Path
command.help: Path to the pdf-to-markdown binary. Leave empty to use the bundled version or PATH lookup.

timeoutMs.label: Extraction Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Maximum time for Nutrient to process a single PDF.

autoEnable.label: Auto-Enable Nutrient Extraction
autoEnable.help: When enabled, the plugin automatically configures OpenClaw to use Nutrient for PDF extraction with pdfjs fallback.
